title: vicia atlantica var. mesatlantica
intro: Vicia atlantica var. mesatlantica, also known as a type of vetch plant, is a perennial plant in the legume family that is native to the Atlantic coastal regions of Europe and North Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Vicia atlantica var. mesatlantica include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as supporting the immune system, due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The herbal preparations of Vicia atlantica var. mesatlantica include infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
